# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Keep MainWindowViewModel blister-selection logic fully aligned with the custom UI numbering shown in MainWindow.axaml (B6, B4, B2 / B5, B3, B1).
- MainWindowViewModel blister selection mapping must follow UI renumbering: Blister1Present->6, Blister2Present->4, Blister3Present->2, Blister4Present->5, Blister5Present->3, Blister6Present->1.
